description_long: This is a four-tier open shelving unit featuring dark brown wooden planks supported by black cinder block-style vertical supports. The shelves are evenly spaced and extend horizontally, providing ample surface area for storage or display. The cinder block supports are hollow, with square cutouts visible on the sides, giving the structure an industrial and utilitarian aesthetic. The overall design is minimalist, with no doors, handles, or enclosed compartments, making all surfaces easily accessible. The materials and construction suggest it is sturdy and suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban outdoor settings. The open design allows for visibility and access from both the front and back.
description: A four-tier open shelf with dark brown wooden planks and black cinder block-style supports, offering an industrial and minimalist look.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four wooden shelves and the hollow cinder block supports with square cutouts.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden shelves and the stacked arrangement of the cinder block supports.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the open structure and cinder block supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the shelf thickness and the vertical alignment of the supports.
